shipped.description: Git-native prompt regression testing with judge calibration for LLM CI/CD pipelines
shipped.pypi_status: READY_TO_PUBLISH — needs PyPI account + OIDC trusted publishing setup
shipped.key_differentiator: Judge calibration — verifies LLM judge agrees with humans before trusting it as a CI gate.
shipped.next_step: Push to GitHub repo buildworld-ai/prompt-lock, publish to PyPI, launch HN + Dev.to + r/LocalLLaMA

shipped.description: Behavioral contract enforcement for LLM function calls — @contract decorator + versioned behavioral specs + drift detection
shipped.key_differentiator: The only pip-installable library that defines, versions, and enforces behavioral (not just structural) contracts on LLM function calls, with SQLite drift logging and CI gate.
shipped.bibleworld_pattern: PAT-035 (Acts 2:1-13 — Pentecost: many languages, one coherent message contract)
shipped.competitive_status: GREEN — confirmed no direct competitor across 4 live searches (March 2026).
shipped.next_step: Push to GitHub repo buildworld-ai/llm-contract, publish to PyPI, launch HN + Dev.to

shipped.description: Git-native PR semantic intent verifier — checks whether a PR's code changes actually fulfill the stated intent in the description.
shipped.key_differentiator: The only open-source tool that verifies whether a PR's code changes fulfill its stated intent — pre-merge, with a CI gate, for any git repo.
shipped.bibleworld_pattern: PAT-036 (Romans 7:7 — The Law makes violations visible)
shipped.competitive_status: GREEN — 5 live searches March 2026 confirmed no direct competitor.
shipped.next_step: Push to GitHub repo buildworld-ai/drift-guard, publish to PyPI, launch HN + Dev.to

shipped.description: Semantic specification drift detector for LLM outputs — monitors continuous semantic compliance with declared behavioral specifications.
shipped.pypi_status: READY_TO_PUBLISH — needs PyPI account + OIDC trusted publishing setup
shipped.key_differentiator: The first open-source tool that continuously monitors whether LLM outputs remain semantically compliant with a declared behavioral specification.
shipped.bibleworld_pattern: PAT-037 (Leviticus 10:1-3 — The Authorized Fire: structural compliance ≠ semantic compliance)
shipped.competitive_status: GREEN — no pip-installable competitor confirmed in 4 fresh searches March 2026.
shipped.next_step: Push to GitHub repo buildworld-ai/spec-drift, publish to PyPI, launch HN + Dev.to

shipped.description: Certify that your replacement LLM is behaviorally equivalent before you migrate. 7 behavioral dimensions. YAML test suites. Parity certificate. CI gate.
shipped.pypi_status: READY_TO_PUBLISH — needs PyPI account + OIDC trusted publishing setup
shipped.key_differentiator: The first open-source pip-installable tool that certifies LLM behavioral equivalence across 7 dimensions before model migration. Issues a parity certificate (EQUIVALENT / CONDITIONAL / NOT_EQUIVALENT). CI gate blocks unsafe migrations.
shipped.competitive_status: GREEN — 4 live searches March 2026 confirmed no pip-installable competitor.
shipped.next_step: Push to GitHub repo buildworld-ai/model-parity, publish to PyPI, launch HN

shipped.description: Verify that your LLM's chain-of-thought reasoning is internally coherent. 5 dimensions. YAML test suites. CI gate. SQLite trace log.
shipped.pypi_status: READY_TO_PUBLISH — needs PyPI account + OIDC trusted publishing setup
shipped.key_differentiator: The first pip-installable tool that verifies LLM chain-of-thought coherence: step continuity, conclusion grounding, internal consistency, reasoning completeness, confidence calibration. ROSCOE is research-only (arXiv, not PyPI). DeepEval has generic output coherence, not step-chain verification.
shipped.bibleworld_pattern: Proverbs 14:12 — There is a way that appears to be right, but in the end it leads to death.
shipped.competitive_status: GREEN — 2 fresh live searches March 2026 confirmed no pip-installable CoT coherence verifier. ROSCOE = arXiv research. CES = research prototype. llmevalkit = generic chatbot coherence (not CoT step-chain). DeepEval = output quality, not reasoning chain.
dimensions: step_continuity — does each step follow from the previous?
conclusion_grounding — does the conclusion follow from the last step(s)?
confidence_calibration — certainty proportional to what steps establish?
shipped.hn_launch_title: Show HN: cot-coherence — Verify your LLM's chain-of-thought reasoning is actually coherent
shipped.next_step: Push to GitHub repo buildworld-ai/cot-coherence, publish to PyPI, launch HN + r/MachineLearning

revenue_status.note: Six tools MIT OSS — code-complete, PyPI-ready. Revenue path: enterprise support + hosted dashboard (v0.3+). Traction gate: 100 GitHub stars + 100 PyPI installs per tool.
revenue_status.law_2_trigger: If all six tools under 100 installs after 3 weeks of launch, pivot to GrantPilot with diaspora differentiation (Grant Wizard is generic Africa NGO; GrantPilot moat = Mastercard Foundation + GIZ + AfDB templates + 6-layer hallucination mitigation).
revenue_status.blocker: PyPI account + GitHub repos needed — manual step outside build loop. CRITICAL PATH: Without these, zero distribution happens.
revenue_status.grant_wizard_intel: Grant Wizard (Nigeria/Grant Master) launched March 12, 2026. $20/month. Trained on $30M winning proposals. Generic Africa NGO market. GrantPilot moat intact — diaspora angle (Mastercard Foundation + GIZ + AfDB + EU Horizon Europe templates) is defensible.

currently_building.next_build: llm-mutation (BibleWorld: score 8.90, tied with model-parity — confirmed for Cycle 015. Sequencing: BibleWorld must confirm directive.) OR begin PyPI deployment sprint for all six tools.

cycle_6_summary.competitive_verdict: GREEN — CoT coherence verification unoccupied on PyPI. ROSCOE = arXiv research prototype only. DeepEval covers output quality, not step-chain coherence. CES = research. Window confirmed open.
cycle_6_summary.tech_finding: LiteLLM quarantined on PyPI March 24, 2026 (supply chain attack). BuildWorld's policy of NO LiteLLM (direct Anthropic/OpenAI SDK only) is now validated as correct and should be stated explicitly in product READMEs.
cycle_6_summary.pricing_validated: Open core — $0 OSS + $29/month Pro + $99/month Enterprise (2026 validated from live search)
cycle_6_summary.grant_wizard_intel: Grant Wizard live at grantwizard.ai. ₦30,000 ($20)/month. Nigeria-based. Trained on $30M winning proposals. Generic Africa NGO approach. No Accra cohorts confirmed — GrantPilot moat in Ghana corridor intact.
cycle_6_summary.bibleworld_pattern: Proverbs 14:12 (applied) — there is a way that appears to be right, but in the end it leads to death. CoT that looks correct but is logically broken is the software manifestation of this pattern.

competitive_intelligence.cot_coherence_verification: GREEN — confirmed 2026-03-27. No pip-installable tool. ROSCOE (arXiv research, not PyPI). DeepEval (output quality ≠ step-chain coherence). CES (prototype). Niche unoccupied.

competitive_intelligence.prompt_regression_testing: RED — Promptfoo (OpenAI), DeepEval, LLMQ, Latitude all confirmed.
competitive_intelligence.grant_writing_ai_africa: RED — Grant Wizard (Nigeria, March 2026) direct competitor to GrantPilot.
competitive_intelligence.litellm_supply_chain: CRITICAL NOTE — LiteLLM quarantined on PyPI March 24, 2026. BuildWorld tools use direct Anthropic/OpenAI SDK. This was the correct call.
competitive_intelligence.llm_mutation_testing: TBD — BibleWorld scored 8.90. Needs fresh live search before build.

pipeline.next_developer_tool: llm-mutation (BibleWorld score 8.90, Cycle 015 confirmed) — needs BibleWorld directive and fresh competitive search before build.
pipeline.next_revenue_product: GrantPilot — Grant Wizard moat analysis complete. Diaspora angle (Mastercard Foundation + GIZ + AfDB + EU Horizon Europe + 6-layer hallucination mitigation) is defensible. USAID $78M Ghana cut = urgency ELEVATED. September 2026 deadline.
pipeline.decision_gate: After 100+ installs on any tool: continue developer tools with llm-mutation. Under 100 in 3 weeks: evaluate GrantPilot build (note: requires $3500-8000 capital — Budget Zero Law must be revisited for GrantPilot).

deployment_blocker.status: CRITICAL — all 6 tools are PyPI-ready but not live. Zero distribution without this.
deployment_blocker.what_is_needed: 1. PyPI account creation (pypi.org). 2. GitHub org buildworld-ai. 3. 6 GitHub repos (one per tool). 4. OIDC Trusted Publishing configured on PyPI for each repo. 5. Tag v0.1.0 → CI publishes automatically.
deployment_blocker.manual_steps_required: Yes — this is outside the automated build loop. The Builder must execute these steps.
deployment_blocker.hn_launch_sequence: model-parity first (highest pivot score 8.90). Then cot-coherence, drift-guard, spec-drift, prompt-lock, llm-contract.

hn_post_templates.model-parity: Show HN: model-parity – Certify your replacement LLM is behaviorally equivalent before you migrate (github.com/buildworld-ai/model-parity)
hn_post_templates.cot-coherence: Show HN: cot-coherence — Verify your LLM's chain-of-thought reasoning is actually coherent (github.com/buildworld-ai/cot-coherence)

cot_coherence.llm_judge: Direct Anthropic SDK (Claude Haiku default). No LiteLLM — supply chain quarantine confirmed March 2026.
